title: DCLA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Cultural Affairs (DCLA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DCLA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/dcla, and the DCLA Grants Management System (dclagms.nyc.gov — a Salesforce Experience Cloud portal). Includes the NYC geography spine and DCLA's own grantee/application keys (Organization name, Application #, Fiscal Year).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Discipline.description: Cultural discipline / field of the organization ('Discipline').

FiscalYear.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/FiscalYear); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/FiscalYear still resolve.

OrganizationReference.description: A reference to a cultural organization (grantee) by name; DCLA funding datasets key on organization name and application number rather than a stable ID.

applicationNumber.description: DCLA application number ('Application #' / 'Application Number') for the funding cycle.

bin.description: Building Identification Number ('BIN') where the organization is sited, when known.
